Ensure a power_array has only a single fun_out value

Source: R/inputchecks.R
EnsureSingleFunOut.Rd

If multiple fun_out values are present in the input take the first one.

Usage

EnsureSingleFunOut(x, condition = "warning", sliced = FALSE)

Arguments

x

A power array

condition

If array is not summarised should a warning or error be produced. Ignored if required dimensions is NULL.

sliced

For the condition text should the user be informed the array is sliced. Ignored if required dimensions is NULL.

Value

A power array with only a single fun_out value

On this page
